users.selectAll: SELECT id, name, username, role FROM public.users ORDER BY name
users.insert: INSERT INTO public.users (name, username, password_hash, role) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4)
users.update: UPDATE public.users SET name = $1, username = $2, password_hash = $3, role = $4 WHERE id = $5

clients.selectAll: SELECT id, name, email, organization, registered_at FROM public.clients ORDER BY id ASC
clients.insert: INSERT INTO public.clients (name, email, organization) VALUES ($1, $2, $3)
clients.update: UPDATE public.clients SET name = $1, email = $2, organization = $3 WHERE id = $4

licenses.selectAll: SELECT l.id, l.serial, l.active, c.name AS client, l.created_at, l.activated_at, l.expires_at FROM public.licenses l LEFT JOIN public.clients c ON l.client_id = c.id ORDER BY l.created_at DESC
licenses.insert: INSERT INTO public.licenses (client_id, serial, expires_at) VALUES ($1, $2, $3)
licenses.insertFromRequest: INSERT INTO public.licenses (client_id, serial, active, created_at, activated_at, expires_at, device_id, hwid, ip_address) VALUES ($1, $2, TRUE, NOW(), NOW(), NULL, $3, $4, $5) RETURNING id, serial
licenses.activate: UPDATE public.licenses SET active = TRUE, activated_at = NOW(), device_id = $1, ip_address = $2 WHERE serial = $3
licenses.selectStatusByDevice: SELECT id, client_id, serial, active, expires_at, device_id, ip_address, activated_at FROM public.licenses WHERE device_id = $1 ORDER BY activated_at DESC LIMIT 1

license_requests.selectAll: SELECT id, device_id, hwid, app_version, ip, status, created_at, approved_at, approved_by FROM public.license_requests ORDER BY created_at DESC
license_requests.selectPendingByDevice: SELECT * FROM public.license_requests WHERE device_id = $1 AND status = 'pending'
license_requests.selectById: SELECT id, device_id, hwid, ip, status FROM public.license_requests WHERE id = $1
license_requests.insert: INSERT INTO public.license_requests (device_id, hwid, app_version, ip, status, created_at) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, 'pending', NOW())
license_requests.approve: UPDATE public.license_requests SET status = 'approved', approved_at = NOW(), approved_by = $1 WHERE id = $2
